name: Eureka Acquisition Corp
summary: Eureka Acquisition Corp (EURK) is a blank check company incorporated on June 13, 2023 as a Cayman Islands exempted corporation. It was formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. Its sponsor is Hercules Capital Management Corp. Its initial public offering closed on July 3, 2024.

partnerships.description: Serves as the Sponsor of Eureka Acquisition Corp.
